---
title: "William Spratt"
---

## William Spratt

**Dates:** (Oct 1819-26 March 1872)

### Description

brother of Harriet Spratt

### Biography

He married (6 Aug 1844) Ann Bond (d. 9 Sept 1863) of peritonitis;  he was porter at Winchester <i>c</i>. 1847-63;  tide waiter at Liverpool. [information from Barrie Spratt]

### Letters

- Letter from Easter Eve [30 March 1872]
- Letter from March 23d 1872

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
